title: C Major Scale
description:
The C Major scale is the most fundamental scale in Western music. 
It contains no sharps or flats, making it unique and easy to learn.

Notes:
C → D → E → F → G → A → B → C

Key Characteristics:
• All white keys
• Clear, bright sound
• Foundation for music theory

title: C Natural Minor Scale
description: Learn the soulful C Natural Minor scale.

title: C Major Chord
description:
🎹 Learn the C Major Chord in just 10 seconds!

Notes:
C • E • G

Simply play these three notes together to create one of the most important chords in piano music.

Perfect for beginners starting their piano journey!

Follow for daily piano lessons, chords, and scales.

#CMajorChord #LearnPiano #PianoChords #PianoLessons #PianoForBeginners #MusicTheory #Shorts

title: G Major Scale
description:
The G Major scale introduces your first sharp! 
It is widely used in folk and pop music.

Notes:
G → A → B → C → D → E → F♯ → G

Key Characteristics:
• Contains one sharp: F♯
• Warm and resonant quality

title: D Major Scale
description:
The D Major scale is a favorite for string players and pianist alike.
It has a triumphant and majestic feel.

Notes:
D → E → F♯ → G → A → B → C♯ → D

Key Characteristics:
• Contains two sharps: F♯ and C♯
• Brilliant and energetic tone
